auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Jam organization API key sent with the X-API-KEY header. Organization owners can create API keys from the Jam API keys page: https://auth.wejam.ai/org/api_keys/.

actions.name: export_data
actions.description: Export one page of Jam training data for reporting or BI workflows.

resource.description: The Jam data-export resource to retrieve.

page.description: The one-indexed page number to return. Jam defaults to 1.

limit.description: The number of records to return. Jam allows 1 to 100.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for exporting Jam training data.

resource.description: The Jam data-export resource to retrieve.

data.description: The records returned for the requested Jam data-export resource.

total.description: The total number of records matching the export request.

page.description: The one-indexed page number returned by Jam.

limit.description: The page size returned by Jam.

hasNext.description: Whether another page exists after this response.

meta.description: Jam pagination metadata for a data-export page.

outputSchema.description: A page of Jam data-export records.
